span.p:
record_flight_bag.sh
Records ROS 2 topics:
• /poses (MoCap)
• /fmu/out/* (PX4 telemetry)
• /fmu/in/* (setpoints)
• /flight_director/active_waypoint
• /rosout (event logs)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Raw unsliced .mcap
200+ MB, 1M+ messages
(all topics, full flight)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PX4 .ulg log
(actuator_motors,
control_allocator_status,
vehicle_rates_setpoint)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PX4 Flight Controller
(Pixhawk 6C)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db_mcap_event_segmenter.py
segment_flight_mcap()
① Scans /flight_director/active_waypoint
for EXP_START_POINT / EXP_END_POINT
② Falls back to coordinate-based slicing
(legacy flights pre-May-24)
③ Slices raw MCAP into per-pass .mcap
④ Padding: ±2.0 s around sweep window

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
repair_mcap()
Auto-healing for corrupted
MCAP headers (SSHFS drops).
Unlimited record-size reader
→ re-writes clean .mcap

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

is_approved_flight()
cutoff ≥ 20260524-1904

span.p:
Per-pass .mcap files
*-pass01.mcap, *-pass02.mcap, …
~10 s per pass, ~5 MB each

span.p:
⏭️ Skipped
(16 flights)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db_loader.py
load_mcap(path) → topic_data, bag_start_ns
• read_ros2_messages() — parses ROS 2 MCAP
• Returns dict[topic → list[Message]]
build_dataframes(topic_data, drone_name, t0)
• /poses → df_mocap (x,y,z + dropout-adaptive resample)
• /fmu/out/vehicle_odometry → df_odom
→ vx/vy/vz EKF velocity (ENU-aligned)
• /fmu/out/sensor_combined → df_imu
→ ax/ay/az, gx/gy/gz, |a|, |g|, a_deviation
• /fmu/out/battery_status → df_bat
• /fmu/in/trajectory_setpoint → df_setpoint
→ dynamic_waypoints extracted from command steps
• /poses (column) → df_column
• /fmu/out/vehicle_status → arming/disarming_time

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db_unsliced_flights_bat_analyser.py
_stream_load_for_battery()
• Memory-safe: streams only 4 topics
(/poses, /fmu/out/battery_status,
vehicle_status, vehicle_odometry)
• Peak RAM: ~350 MB (vs 5+ GB naive)
• Computes flight-level takeoff→landing rates:
capacity_drain_rate_flying %/min
voltage_drop_rate_flying V/min
• Output → flights_battery_efficiency table

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
config/drone_config.json
SSOT: drone tracker name
(primary role → rigid body)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compute_velocity(df_mocap)
• resample_and_interpolate_mocap()
→ uniform 100 Hz grid, dropout gap repair
• Savitzky-Golay differentiation
window=19, polyorder=3
• Raw + splined velocity profiles

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compute_ekf_kinematics(df_odom, df_mocap)
• Extracts EKF velocity from vehicle_odometry
(vx, vy, vz → ENU-aligned)
• Resampled to 100 Hz uniform grid
• Returns df_ekf_kin: t, vx, vy, vz, speed
• IMMUNE to MoCap dropouts
(IMU propagation through gaps)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
find_waypoint_events(df_mocap, df_sp, t_takeoff, …)
① Micro-pass detection: if already sliced,
use bag boundary times (deterministic)
② detect_mission_class() → label-based
(no hardcoded coordinates!)
③ WP2 refined: last t where speed < 0.10 m/s
before crossing Y=0.70m (actual movement)
④ Column Impact: closest MoCap approach
to column centre within cage radius
⑤ Self-healing: aborted passes reconstruct
WP3/WP4 from telemetry boundaries
⑥ return_all=True → all passes in one flight

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
calculate_metrics(df_mocap, wp_events, …)
• impact_speed, impact_accel (EKF-based)
• achieved_impact_angle (velocity vector vs column)
• avg/max deviation, recovery_area
• closest_clearance (cage perimeter → column)
• path_spread_sdld (lateral displacement std)
• 18 IMU structural metrics:
peak accel/gyro (per-axis + magnitude)
integrated energy, settling time, vibration spread
• nom_sp / act_sp / nom_ep / act_ep
(nominal vs actual waypoint coordinates)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
get_ulog_motor_metrics(flight_dir, pass_path, …)
⚡ PX4 ULog parsing (pyulog):
• actuator_motors → avg/max before & after
motor_thrust_surge, motor_imbalance_after
• Clock sync: timesync_status (priority)
→ fallback: EKF velocity correlation
• control_allocator_status →
saturation_duration, max_unallocated_torque,
thrust_setpoint_achieved_pct
• vehicle_rates_setpoint + angular_velocity →
roll/pitch/yaw RMS rate tracking errors

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_events_log(…)
Chronological flight event journal:
Arming → Takeoff → WP1 → WP2
→ Column Impact → WP3 → Landing
with battery % at each event

all required columns
present + non-NULL?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db_manager.py
init_db()
• Creates flights_summary (PK: flight_name)
• Creates flights_battery_efficiency (PK: flight_name)
• 60+ columns with backwards-compat migration
• APPROVED_CUTOFF = '20260524-1904'
insert_or_replace_flight(flight_name, condition, metrics)
• 65-column INSERT OR REPLACE
• Converts clearance to cm, sets impact_detected flag
• Waypoints: nominal (from mission SSoT)
vs actual (from MoCap at event timestamps)
insert_or_replace_battery_efficiency(…)
• 21-column INSERT OR REPLACE
• Flight-level battery metrics from unsliced MCAPs
get_database_df() → pandas DataFrame
get_database_summary_markdown() → thesis audit table

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
experiments_summary.db
flights_summary:
179 passes total
127 clean impacted
56 Fixed Cage
52 Rotating Cage
0 NULL battery columns
flights_battery_efficiency:

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
kin_plot_trajectory.py
plot_trajectory()
• Top-down 2D spatial path
• Column + cage to-scale circles
• Dynamic waypoints from setpoints
• 1:1 aspect ratio, 0.5m grid
• SVG drone icons at waypoints

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
kin_plot_kinematics.py
plot_ekf_kinetic_profile()
• EKF speed + tangential accel
• No MoCap dropout artifacts!
plot_imu_dynamics()
• a_deviation + g_deviation
• Time-aligned to peak accel gradient
plot_imu_xyz_components()
• Per-axis accelerometer + gyro
• RGB colour coding (X=R,Y=G,Z=B)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
kin_plot_actuators.py
plot_actuators_and_status()
• Motor commands + arming state
plot_control_allocator_saturation()
• Torque allocation + saturation flags
plot_pid_rate_tracking()
• Setpoint vs actual angular rates
• RMS tracking error overlay

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
kin_plot_statistics.py
plot_angle_boxplots()
• Side-by-side Fixed vs Rotating
• Per-angle-bucket comparisons
• Impact speed, deviation, recovery

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
eda_angle_prediction.py
(standalone research module)
• load_impact_data() → DB query
• plot_correlation_heatmap()
Pearson r, all IMU features vs angle
• plot_top3_scatter()
Huber trendlines, battery-coloured
• plot_parallel_coordinates()
Multi-dimensional angle-group view

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

② ekf_kinetic_profile
③ imu_dynamics
④ imu_xyz_components
⑤ actuators_profile
⑥ control_allocator_saturation

(+ battery_sag retired)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
experiments_analysis.ipynb
Interactive single-flight viewer
• Setup → Trajectory → EKF kinetic
• IMU dynamics → Battery sag
• Actuators → PID tracking
• Flight picker → representative finder
(no DB writes — read-only)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
experiments_analysis_summary.ipynb
Aggregate comparative dashboard
• Fixed vs Rotating boxplots
• Deceleration vs battery trendlines
• Post-impact deviation by angle
• Stabilisation overlay plots
• Huber & Theil-Sen robust fitting

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
plot_to_a3_pdf.py
Per-pass print dumper
• A3 portrait, 2×3 grid
• 127 pages, 2 volumes
• impact_only filter from DB
• for physical pen review

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
thesis/main.pdf
LaTeX compiled document
• \\includegraphics{Figures/*.pdf}
• \\autoref{fig:*} cross-refs
• latexmk → pdflatex → bibtex → …

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🟢 NOTEBOOK PATH
experiments_analysis.ipynb
→ db_pipeline.run(label, angle, flights=…)
→ process_flights() → plot → display inline

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🟡 CLI BATCH PATH
python3 -m dev_logs.analysis.database.db_pipeline
→ scans all approved flights
→ standalone DB population
→ per-pass PNG generation
→ prints summary markdown table
